threats.title: Microsoft Confirms RoguePlanet Defender Zero-Day, Says Patch is in Development
threats.summary: Microsoft has formally disclosed that it's working to release a patch to address a Defender zero-day codenamed RoguePlanet. threats.title: Junior Hacker Used Tailscale and OpenSSH to Keep Access After His C2 Went Offline
threats.summary: A French-speaking attacker broke into a small French automotive business, planted a keylogger, and stole banking and email credentials. Ordinary stuff, until one move near the end. Before his command-and-control server went dark, he installed OpenSSH and Tailscale on a victim's machine, building a way back in that did not run through the C2 at all.
